init_hook: helm plugin list | grep -q '^diff' || helm plugin install https://github.com/databus23/helm-diff
helm plugin list | grep -q '^unittest' || helm plugin install https://github.com/helm-unittest/helm-unittest.git

scripts.kind:setup: kind create cluster --config config/kind-config.yaml && kubectl cluster-info --context kind-helm-chart-test
scripts.ut:test: if [ -n "${CHART:-}" ]; then helm unittest "charts/$CHART"; else helm unittest charts/*; fi
